abilities: The best defense is a good barrier.
I got a bit too excited there.
I hope I didn't upset anyone.
I need to... temper my temper.
I seem to have, uh... lost my temper. *nervous chuckle*
chatter: A better world is possible today.
I can't wait to see you all in action.
Let's see how they like my Tesla Cannon's new long-range mode. It can be rather... shocking!
Science means going where outcomes are uncertain. But I am certain that we're going to have a great time!
There's always science to be done.
This looks like the best team in the solar system!
It's good to have the band back together again. (with only former Overwatch members on the team)
After this, I need a peer review of my new paper on Markington particles. No dying during the mission! *chuckles* (with multiple scientist heroes on the team)
Science team... assemble! *chuckle* (with multiple scientist heroes on the team)
Talon? How dare you show your faces!... Though, perhaps we should finish the mission before we get into that. (with only Talon agents as teammates)
I know we'll do it together!
Great job, team! We just need to win one more round!
I'm so proud of us, team!
Keep this going and we'll win this!
If we work together, we can still turn this around!
We can't give up, no matter how tough it gets!
It's all come down to this. Let's make the most of it!
This is it! Let's make it happen!
Challenging. But, anything worthwhile usually is.
It's never too late to try again!
Not quite... but I am closer than I was before!
Quitting is not in my vocabulary.
The moon base wasn't built in a day.
They can't beat me if I keep on trying!
It was all going so well! (eliminated with Kill Streak)
Let's recreate those results. (eliminated with Kill Streak)
My colleagues still seem to be regrouping.
Where's the rest of my research team?
There's always room for self improvement.
Did you miss me? Because I missed you!
*chuckles* I'm just trying to do my part.
call-outs: Let's show these foes a ruckus!
Their numbers are greater than ours!
Feeling powerful... and I'm not even angry!
Athena says there's not much time left. Keep defending!
By my calculations, our defenses will hold if we redouble our efforts!
Hang in there, team. I know we can do it!
Just a little bit longer team!
Time's running out! Let's keep our defense up!
We're doing great, team. I calculate our victory is imminent!
A cursory evaluation indicates time's running out.
By my calculations-- oh, forget it, let's move!
My data indicates we're low on time. Keep up the attack!
Tactical analysis suggests we're running out of time. Attack!
There's not much time left. Let's give it our all!
We're going to lose! Press the attack!
eliminations: Bet you didn't expect that from a scientist.
I've rearranged your molecules for you.
Now you are the endangered species.
Regrettable. I consider violence a last resort.
Would you like to donate your body to science?
*sigh* I'd hoped to give you a warmer welcome... (eliminating Anran or Wuyang )
Crime never pays. (eliminating Ashe , Junkrat or Roadhog )
I beat you to the punch! (eliminating Doomfist )
You should change your name to "Dumbfist"! ...Okay, that was bad. (eliminating Doomfist )
You reap what you sow. (eliminating Reaper )
You stay away from my computer systems. (eliminating Sombra )
A thief always gets caught. (eliminating Widowmaker )
Hah! We'll always have the Lunar Colony. (eliminating Wrecking Ball )
That was a close one! (on low HP)
Don't mess with a flying scientist! (while airborne)
Oh! In mid-air, no less! (while airborne)
I wouldn't advise flying during a storm. (eliminating airborne enemy with secondary fire)
No matter how fast you are, lightning is faster. (eliminating enemy using movement-based ability)
That's what I call a meltdown! (eliminating a frozen enemy via Mei 's Blizzard)
I just wish you'd stop coming back! (eliminating a recently resurrected Reaper )
Dr. De Kuiper, that experiment was unethical. (eliminating Sigma using Gravitic Flux)
I didn't guess your position. I extrapolated it! (eliminating Sombra using Stealth)
Not jumping out of that one, Mrs. Lacroix! (eliminating Widowmaker using Grappling Hook)
The data states I'm in the zone!
Maybe I went a little overboard.
Was that all of them? Outstanding!
A gorilla never forgets. Like elephants!
I've come back with a vengeance!
I have you covered, Captain. (to Ana or Sojourn )
No one hurts Mei and gets away with it. (to Mei )
How was that for good timing? (to Tracer )
Looks like they... fell for it!
Every structure has its weak point.
I'm so glad you joined our team! (to Anran or Wuyang )
You're one ferocious feline! (to Jetpack Cat )
My stars. What a shot! (to Widowmaker )
interactions: Winston : Ana... may I still call you Captain? Ana : Oh, Winston. That was a long time ago. Winston : You'll always be Captain in my heart!

Winston : Baptiste, I was wondering... how are you so confident? Baptiste : Well, it's all about attitude. If you think you're good, then you are good. Yeah? Winston : "If I think I'm good"... Hold on, I need to take notes... Baptiste : Right, uh... off to a good start.

D.Va : Winston, I have to get a picture with you! Winston : Uh... with me? D.Va : Duh! My fans love hearing about you. Let's get a selfie the next time we're patching up my mech! Winston : I... sure! Sounds like fun!
Echo : Is peanut butter that delicious? Winston : It's peanuty buttery heaven! Echo : But my analysis shows me it's high in trans saturated fats. Winston : Did Athena put you up to this?
Echo : Winston, have you ever noticed any similarities between Athena and me? Winston : Uh... you both have a... dry sense of humor. Echo : Perhaps that is programming we share.

Winston : Here's another one! What sickness do pilots usually get? One of three: Echo : Hmm... what? Pharah : Sick of your jokes? Tracer : Ooh-- airsick? Winston : The flew! One of three : Echo : I'm glad that's impossible for me. Pharah : Okay, Winston. Tracer : Ohoho! That was a pretty good one!
Winston : I have some flying experience too, actually! Echo : Really? Winston : Hm, sort of. The gravity on the moon was very low. Pharah : That doesn't count.
Winston : You know, Agent Skov... when the world needs saving, there's no one more up to the challenge than search and rescue! Freja : Hm. Maybe you ought to find someone who still does it, then.
Kiriko : Genji, remember the time you tripped over your sword in training? Winston : * chuckles * Is that true? Genji : It only happened once . Kiriko : Once was enough.
Illari : I didn't know monkeys needed glasses. Winston : Actually, I'm a gorilla... And a scientist.

Winston : Fika, were you playing on my desk again? You accidentally tripped my security systems! Jetpack Cat : *innocent meows* Winston : *chuckle* Aww, it's okay. I'll find you something else to play with.

Winston : You remind me of an old friend from the Lunar Colony . Jetpack Cat : *questioning meows* Winston : You're both smart, and cute, and love finding trouble! I hope I can introduce you to him one day.
Junkrat : Peter Piper picked a pepp-- No. Peter Piper pecked a--UGH! Kiriko : Are you people always this loud? Winston : He's, uh... not with us.

Juno : It is hard to appreciate the Earth's beauty during all this conflict... Winston : At times like this, I remember a good friend 's advice. Juno : You do? May I hear it? Winston : "Never accept the world as it appears to be. Dare to see it for what it could be."
Winston : Hey, Kiriko. Do you do a lot of office work? Kiriko : No, why? Winston : Because you always leave a paper trail! Kiriko : *sigh*
Lifeweaver : Don't leap too far away! I can only work a limited amount of miracles. Winston : Worried I'll leave you in a... "thorny" situation? Lifeweaver : Oh, dear...
Lúcio : So, I'm trying to ask everybody this. What is your favorite animal? Winston : Hmm... humans, I suppose! Lúcio : Uh... yeah, I can see it!
Mauga : I've always wanted to pet a gorilla. Winston : * nervous chuckle * How about a firm handshake, with the guns down?
Winston : Can you look at my report later? Something seems off. Mei : Winston, you know what I'm going to say to that. Winston : *laugh* Of course. I know I "can always count on Mei"!
Winston : I can't wait for our next hot pot, Mei! Mei : Next time, I'll get more peanut sauce for you! Winston : Maybe without all the... spice? Mei : Winston! That's the best part!
Mercy : Call to me if you need help. I won't let you fall. Winston : Dr. Ziegler, don't forget. We're here to support you too. Mercy : Thank you, Winston. I... needed to hear that.
Winston : I've got one! What do you call a sleeping detective? Pharah : Tired. Winston : No, undercover! Pharah : Oh... huh. Sorry, I forgot to laugh. Again.
Winston : Do you know what happens to a bad joke about flying? Pharah : *sigh* Here we go... Winston : It never lands! Pharah : Clearly.
Pharah : Hey, Winston. Want to hear a secret joke about peanut butter? Winston : I sure do! Pharah : Sorry, can't tell you. You might spread it. Winston : Aww... *gasp* Wait... I get it!
Winston : You couldn't stop Overwatch from getting back together. Now look at us! Reaper : You want a medal or something?
Winston : I'm so happy you answered the recall , Reinhardt. Reinhardt : For you, my old friend? Heh, of course.

Reinhardt : Winston! You still haven't told me that joke about the periodic table! Winston : Oh, well... when I asked, you were supposed to answer... 'Na'! *chuckle* Reinhardt : But why would I say 'Na'? I love jokes.
Winston : I remember you. You visited the doctor on the Lunar Colony. Sigma : *sigh* He was a good friend. And you were much smaller, back then.
Sigma : Do you ever miss it? The moon? Winston : Sometimes. But there's nothing there for me now.
Soldier: 76 : I was just in the kitchen. Anyone have something they wanna confess? Winston : Those banana peels are not mine. Soldier: 76 : *tired sigh*
Winston : How are you bypassing device firewalls? Localized microbursts of EMPs? Sombra : You know I'm not going to tell you. Winston : Controlled zero-point energy fluctuations? Sombra : Stop it!
Symmetra : You smell strongly of artificial coconut. Winston : Do you like it? Lena got me a six pack of 'Coco Island' shampoo. I used the whole bottle! Symmetra : Eugh... That is excessive...
Winston : I'd be happy to build you a jump pack, if you'd like. Torbjörn : I prefer my two feet on the ground.
Winston : So... I noticed you don't send me bananas anymore. Tracer : You said you didn't want any! *laugh*

Winston : I got you a present, Lena! But you can't unwrap it until after the mission. Tracer : Ooh, what is it? Winston : Wha-- I'm not going to tell you! Tracer : Pleeease, Winston? Please? Just a little hint? Winston : Absolutely not!
Winston : You seem like a born archeologist! Would you say it's "in your bones"? Venture : You know, I would, but my career is in ruins!
Winston : Winston! Venture : Venture! Winston : Winston! Venture : Venture. Winston : Winston! Venture : Uh... *whispers* Hey, is he okay?
Winston : I miss the Lunar Colony sometimes, especially that view. Wrecking Ball : *hamster noises* He does not miss the food.
Wrecking Ball : Where did all the Simians in the Lunar Colony go? Winston : I... wish I knew. Oh... Hypatia , especially. Wrecking Ball : Oh... her.

Winston : Hammond, we were friends on Horizon . Where did we go wrong? Wrecking Ball : * hamster noises * Perhaps it was when you stole his rocket design. Winston : Oh, no! I found that in the system. It was an accident! Wrecking Ball : * hamster noises * Was it also an "accident" when you left for Earth without him?

Wuyang : Oh, oh! Winston! Why does water never laugh at jokes? Winston : Because it doesn't like dry humor? Wuyang : Aw, hey! You stole my punchline... Winston : No, I didn't. You just let it "slip" away!

Zarya : Winston! You've let yourself go. Winston : I-I haven't! (pause) Maybe just a little bit. Zarya : We will go to the gym together. After the mission. Tonight. Winston : F-for how long? Zarya : I will tell you when we are done.

Winston: Anyone wanna hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? (fails) One of 13: Ana: No thank you. Ashe: Can't say I do. Baptiste: I'm guessing... No. Cassidy: I'm still puzzling over the last one. Doomfist: Ugh... I do not . Echo: This is not, perhaps, the best time. Genji: I do not. Hanzo: No. Junker Queen: Not unless you want that table broken over your head! Pharah: No one wants that. Reaper: No . Sojourn: Uh, Winston, please. No. Soldier: 76: No! Nope.

Winston: Anyone want to hear my favorite joke about the periodic table? (succeeds) One of 7: Brigitte: Na! D.Va: Na! * laughs * Junkrat: I dunno. Will it make me go "He He"? Eh? Mei: Na! Mercy: N-A! Moira: Na... Reinhardt: Yes! But I can't promise I'll understand it! Winston: *chuckles*
map-specific: So much data at this eco-Watchpoint! I get the "shivers" just thinking about it.

That's home. That's us. On it, everyone you love, everyone you know, everyone you ever heard of, every human being who ever was, lived out their lives. The aggregate of our joy and suffering. Every hunter and forager, every hero and coward, every creator and destroyer of civilization, every king and peasant, every young couple in love, every mother and father, hopeful child, inventor and explorer, every saint and sinner in history... lived there.
The first day or so we pointed to our countries. The third or fourth day, we were pointing to our continents. By the fifth day, we were aware of only one earth.

To see the earth as it truly is, small and blue and beautiful in that eternal silence where it floats, is to see ourselves as riders on the earth together. Brothers on that bright loveliness in the eternal cold - brothers who know now, they are truly brothers.
Hm, better keep an eye on the omnium radiation levels.
I hear they call him the Champ here. And to think, he used to sleep inside my pillow...
I bet the view at the top of the Empire State Building is great!
I would love to learn French... one day!
Let's make this quick. I have peanut butter banana bread in the oven.
